Comprehensive Benchmark Report

OTEL Generator Demo Data Queries (Blockpack) + Format Comparison (Blockpack vs Parquet)
Generated March 24, 2026 at 08:59 AM

⚠️ S3 Latency Simulation

All benchmarks include artificial 20ms latency per I/O operation to simulate otel-demo-data AWS S3 performance characteristics. This reflects typical first-byte latency (10-20ms) for S3 requests within the same region. Total execution time = processing time + (I/O ops × 20ms).

📊 Overview

OTEL Generator Demo Data Queries: 19 (actual trace data, blockpack vs parquet)
Limited Queries: 0 (blockpack vs parquet, max 20 traces × 3 spans)
Trace-by-ID: 1 (single trace retrieval, blockpack vs parquet)
Aggregation Comparisons: 0 (aggregation vs manual vs parquet)
Format Comparisons: 30 (synthetic data, blockpack vs parquet)

📑 Table of Contents

  • 🌍 OTEL Generator Demo Data Queries (Blockpack vs Parquet)
  • 🎯 Limited Queries (Blockpack vs Parquet)
  • 🔍 Get Trace by ID (Blockpack vs Parquet)
  • 📊 Aggregation vs Parquet
  • ⚖️ Format Comparison (Blockpack vs Parquet)
  • 💾 Write Path (Blockpack vs Parquet)
  • 📝 Query Definitions
Actual trace data from e-commerce demo • 669,886 spans
Blockpack 10.6 MB Parquet 9.6 MB Blockpack is 1.1x larger
Query Win Blockpack Parquet
Wall CPU Bytes Read I/O Ops Traces Spans Memory Allocations Cost Wall CPU Bytes Read I/O Ops Traces Spans Memory Allocations Cost

Bulk write performance for a complete block
Scale Blockpack Parquet
Time Output Size Memory Allocs Spans Written ns/span Time Output Size Memory Allocs Spans Written ns/span
small 280.44ms 4.29 MB 191.84 MB 1,201,175 62,500 0.0 142.55ms (2.0x) 3.93 MB (1.1x) 73.98 MB (2.6x) 235,262 (5.1x) 62,500 0.0

OTEL Generator Demo Data Queries

Fast Operations

TraceQL: 
{ duration < 30ms }

Get Requests

TraceQL: 
{ span.http.method = "GET" }

Http Errors

TraceQL: 
{ span.http.status_code >= 400 }

Payment Operations

TraceQL: 
{ name =~ ".*[Pp]ayment.*" }

Post Requests

TraceQL: 
{ span.http.method = "POST" }

Format Comparison Queries

Duration Gt 100Ms

Filter operations longer than 100ms
TraceQL: 
{ duration > 100ms }

Experiment Traces

Experimental feature traces
TraceQL: 
{ span.experiment.id = "exp-2024-q1" }

Filter Auth Namespace

Filter by auth namespace
TraceQL: 
{ resource.service.namespace = "auth" }

Filter Authenticate Operation

Filter authenticate operations
TraceQL: 
{ name = "authenticate" }

Filter Billing Service

Filter by billing service
TraceQL: 
{ resource.service.name = "billing-service" }

Filter By Db Operations

Filter PostgreSQL database operations
TraceQL: 
{ span.db.system = "postgresql" }

Filter By Http Method Post

Filter by HTTP POST method
TraceQL: 
{ span.http.method = "POST" }

Filter By Http Status 200

Filter by HTTP 200 status
TraceQL: 
{ span.http.status_code = 200 }

Filter By Http Status 201

Filter created resources - HTTP 201
TraceQL: 
{ span.http.status_code = 201 }

Filter By Http Status 403

Filter auth failures - HTTP 403
TraceQL: 
{ span.http.status_code = 403 }

Filter By Service Auth

Filter by auth-service
TraceQL: 
{ resource.service.name = "auth-service" }

Filter By Service Shop

Filter by shop-backend service
TraceQL: 
{ resource.service.name = "shop-backend" }

Filter Payment Operation

Filter payment operations
TraceQL: 
{ name = "process_payment" }

Filter Shop Namespace

Filter by shop namespace
TraceQL: 
{ resource.service.namespace = "shop" }

Full Scan

Full table scan - all spans
TraceQL: 
{}

Gold Customers

Gold tier customers
TraceQL: 
{ span.customer.tier = "gold" }

Gold Us West

Gold customers in us-west
TraceQL: 
{ span.customer.tier = "gold" && span.deployment.region = "us-west" }

Mixed Db Namespace And Db

Mixed filter: db namespace + PostgreSQL
TraceQL: 
{ resource.namespace = "db" && span.db.system = "postgresql" }

Platinum Customers

Platinum tier customers only
TraceQL: 
{ span.customer.tier = "platinum" }

Platinum Us West

Platinum customers in us-west
TraceQL: 
{ span.customer.tier = "platinum" && span.deployment.region = "us-west" }

Regex Article Operations

TraceQL: 
{ name =~ ".*article.*" }

Us West Region

{ span.deployment.region = "us-west" }

Green highlight = Aggregation wins · Orange highlight = Manual wins · Blue highlight = Parquet wins

Hardware: 13th Gen Intel Core i7-13700K (24 threads) • OS: Linux
